additionalData.description: This field contains additional data, which may be returned in a particular response.

pspReference.description: Adyen's 16-character string reference associated with the transaction. This value is globally unique; quote it when communicating with us about this response.

response.description:
The response:
* In case of success, it is either `payout-confirm-received` or `payout-decline-received`.
* In case of an error, an informational message is returned.
